scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner kitchen matching image1 layout. Male chef (image2) in white double-breasted chef coat, black-and-white checkered pants, and white chef hat scrapes the flattop with a metal spatula working through morning grease, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script who stands nearby facing him. Warm kitchen morning light.
